description_long: This is a bolt-action rifle with a classic wooden stock and a long, slender barrel, reminiscent of early to mid-20th century military sniper rifles. The stock is made of polished wood, extending from the butt to the fore-end, providing a sturdy and ergonomic grip. The receiver and barrel assembly are metallic, with a matte finish, and the rifle is equipped with a prominent telescopic scope mounted above the receiver for precision aiming. The bolt handle is visible on the right side, indicating manual cycling of the action. The trigger guard and magazine area are integrated into the lower metal assembly, and the muzzle is simple, lacking any complex attachments. The overall design is utilitarian, robust, and optimized for long-range accuracy.
description: A classic bolt-action rifle with a wooden stock, long metal barrel, and a mounted telescopic scope, designed for precision shooting.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, wooden stock, metal barrel, and mounted scope.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the narrow barrel profile and the alignment of the scope above the receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the bolt handle, scope, and the full wooden stock.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the buttstock and the scope's rear lens, with the bolt handle visible.
